_note: FALLBACK DATA — researched snapshot, not live. Replace at runtime via Google Places API (New) once GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY + place_id are set. See src/lib/places.ts.

reviews.author: Aarav Mehta
reviews.text: Hands down the best veg cafe in Indore. The vada pav fondue is genius and the Lotus Biscoff shake is unreal. Cosy, premium and never disappoints.

reviews.author: Sneha Kulkarni
reviews.text: Open kitchen, gorgeous interiors and such warm staff. Came for a catch-up and stayed for hours. The sizzler was the highlight of the evening.

reviews.author: Rahul Verma
reviews.text: Great ambiance and laptop-friendly during the day. Loaded pizza and malai broccoli tikka were excellent. Slightly busy on weekends but worth it.

reviews.author: Priya Nair
reviews.text: The flagship for a reason. Black rice khichdi and the blueberry cheesecake were beautifully done. Pure veg done with real finesse.

reviews.author: Karan Shah
reviews.text: Lovely place for couples and friends. Chaat platter is a fun twist on street food. Will definitely be back for the shakes.
